message:
polish(viz): DeliverablesTreeViz round 1/3 — affordances

- Folder buttons: min-h-[2.75rem] + py-2 for touch-safe targets,
  hover:bg-white/[0.04] feedback, violet-300 focus ring with offset
- Leaf buttons: min-h-[2.75rem], hover:scale-[1.01]/active:scale-[0.99]
  press feedback, aria-label with file + label for screen readers
- Spotlight cards: hover:scale-[1.02]/active:scale-[0.98] + aria-label
- Search input: aria-describedby linked to filter count with live region
- Filter count: role="status" + aria-live="polite" for dynamic updates
- All focus rings upgraded to violet-300/60 with ring-offset

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
